---
title: Place Paris 19
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779810120/levoltigeur_tbmlxz.png
description: Place avec Le Voltigeur, Paris 19e
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2025/07/25
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779810120/levoltigeur_tbmlxz.png)
